name: @openmagnetics/mvbpp
description: MVB++ WASM bindings — OpenMagnetics 3-D geometry builder

scripts.build: source ~/emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && emcmake cmake -S . -B build-wasm -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -GNinja && ninja -C build-wasm -j2 && mkdir -p dist && cp build-wasm/mvbpp.js build-wasm/mvbpp.wasm dist/
